title: nf-schema example - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

paired.errorMessage: Paired must be true or false

bam.errorMessage: BAM file must be co-ordinate sorted, indexed and must have extension '.bam'

index.errorMessage: BAM file index, must have extension '.bai' or '.csi'
